reviews.review_description: Love ts game but idk how to join servers and i cant see whats on the computer keys cus theyre white but still very cool monsters also in the future you could make a pvp mode

Heya there! Co-Owner here. I know this review might seem biased but I'm telling you this game is great. It's pretty different from the rest, despite that being what everyone says.

- The game doesn't take itself too seriously. With characters like The Critter, and the hysterical moderation team, this game never ceases to try and make you laugh!
- Constant updates. The game is always looking to improve, and Zardy (the owner) is always looking for new ideas and bugs to fix. Everything's set to change, so be prepared!
- Ahead of its time. Because of everyone on the team being noticed and having ideas, there are plenty of ideas and things ingame that are ahead of its time.

Also, psst!! I heard a remaster of this game by the same person was out that's twice as good as this!

- eggerz

So you’re telling me that the top head is very basic but the crown and the Santa hat are more basic than you normally think so I would like for you to add it in the game and never ever say it’s a basic cosmetic ever again because you said that and you literally added two of the most basic items ever, I can’t go into a gorilla tag lobby without seeing anybody wearing the Santa hat so please if you don’t add you’re just autistic I guess ￼ and don’t even get me started on the crown ￼ including the 
cone
 
￼
This game is really fun and moderation team is a w. Definitely recommend playing(:
